text: Nov 3 2026 committee meeting minutes
Attendance: Matt, Pastor David, Frank Herrera, Rosa, Deacon Maria, Deacon Ruth
Frank presented pledge tally $5,600 — Matt flagged this includes 6 unfulfilled pledges
Elena confirmed menu expansion +$600 (total $3,400)
Casa Flores +$25 altar arrangement authorized by Rosa
Volunteer count 38 confirmed 8 maybe 8 no response
Wellness booth $400 line — Matt to bring own herbal preps, budget covers screening supplies + gift bags
Registration capacity concern: 234 registered vs planned 175
Parking overflow signage $25 approved from contingency $250
Action item: Matt to bring reconciliation Dec 8
Wellness Booth Plan Dec 12 2026 — noon to 5 pm
Location: Fellowship Hall corner near west windows
Staff: Matt Coleman (curandero, retired RN) + Rosa Villarreal (assist) + optional Consuelo Marquez (BP check)
Own herbal preps to bring (no budget draw): chamomile tea sachets 40, rosemary infused oil vials 20, aloe salve tins 30, damiana tea sachets 20, sage smudge bundles 15
Budget $400 covers: nitrile gloves, BP cuff replacement, thermometer batteries, gift bag paper, holiday-branded labels, hand sanitizer, table cover, first aid backup
Screening offerings: BP check, brief nutrition consult, herbal recommendation (with med interaction check disclaimer)
Vendor Status Board as of 2026-11-29
Elena Kitchen: original $2,800 -> confirmed $3,400 (+$600) — menu expanded per Pastor David request
Casa Flores: original $450 -> confirmed $475 (+$25) — altar arrangement added by Rosa
Los Hermanos Trio: $600 unchanged — setlist confirmed villancicos + 2 modern
EP Party Rentals: original $350 -> confirmed $380 (+$30 delivery fee)
Audio Express: $175 unchanged — 2 amps + 4 mics
Wellness Booth: $400 line intact — Matt covering herbal from own supplies
Morning prayer 6:00 AM as always. Rosary today for Aunt Carmen.
Walk 6:30 AM. Right knee tender but manageable. Cielo Vista loop.
Breakfast: oatmeal with cinnamon, black coffee in Arturo's mug.
Wellness room open 10 AM — one client today.
Siesta 2-3 PM. Rest well.
Chamomile tea 9 PM. Bed by 10.
